diff --git a/src/main.rs b/src/main.rs
index 1234567..abcdefg 100644
--- a/src/main.rs
+++ b/src/main.rs
@@ -1,10 +1,15 @@
 use std::fs;
 use serde::{Serialize, Deserialize};
+use dialoguer::{Input, Select};
+use uuid::Uuid;

 fn main() {
     println!("Hello, world!");
+
+    // Initialize configuration
+    let config = load_config().unwrap_or_default();
+    process_git_diff(&config).await.unwrap();
 }

 #[derive(Serialize, Deserialize)]
 struct Config {
     api_key: String,
+    provider: String,
+    model: String,
 }

diff --git a/tests/test_utils.rs b/tests/test_utils.rs
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..1111111
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tests/test_utils.rs
@@ -0,0 +1,25 @@
+use crate::common::*;
+
+#[cfg(test)]
+mod test_utilities {
+    use super::*;
+
+    #[test]
+    fn test_environment_creation() {
+        let env = TestEnvironment::new().unwrap();
+        assert!(std::path::Path::new(env.path()).exists());
+    }
+
+    #[test]
+    fn test_file_creation() {
+        let env = TestEnvironment::new().unwrap();
+        env.create_file("test.txt", "content").unwrap();
+
+        let file_path = std::path::Path::new(env.path()).join("test.txt");
+        assert!(file_path.exists());
+
+        let content = std::fs::read_to_string(file_path).unwrap();
+        assert_eq!(content, "content");
+    }
+}
